title: Requirement frontmatter schema
description: Schema for FR (functional requirement), NFR, and CON artifacts. Reverse links (delivered_by, implemented_by, verified_by) are computed by the traceability script.

parent_epic.description: Wiki link to the parent Epic

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ or CTRL artifacts this requirement is derived from

depends_on.description: Wiki links to other FR/NFR this requirement depends on

source_docs.description: External document references. Only if derives_from is empty (direct stakeholder requirement).

quality_attribute.description: For NFRs only: performance, security, scalability, etc.
